response:
<<Stress Analysis Report>>
The maximum substance abuse incidents occur when the economic stress index is 2, resulting in 13 incidents per 1000 people. To keep incidents below 20, the community must maintain a stress index between approximately 0.1 and 3.9. This analysis reminds us that human well-being is as fragile as water in a western drought. Even a baseball game cannot distract from the need to manage these economic pressures effectively.
